turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Thank you for calling support, how can I help you today?

turns.speaker: customer
turns.text: I've been waiting three weeks for my refund and I still haven't received anything. This is completely unacceptable.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: I completely understand your frustration and I'm really sorry about the delay.

turns.speaker: customer
turns.text: I want to speak to a manager. I'm going to cancel my account if this isn't resolved today.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Absolutely, let me pull up your account right now and get this sorted for you.
